data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that 'Winners and losers tracked with response statuses (won/lost)', but the evidence does not provide any confirmation that this requirement is met. The linked use case outlines the need for tracking the status of bids, yet there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the existence or functionality of this tracking mechanism. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence confirming that winners and losers are tracked with response statuses (won/lost).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add tracking mechanism evidence
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the tracking of winners and losers with response statuses.
